title: GravesSystem
description: GravesSystem replaces item drops on death with an immersive grave system that spawns the player’s head, preserves their exact inventory layout, displays a live hologram, and restores items instantly — all while remaining lightweight and highly performant.
body:
**[⚠️]NOTE!** If u have aby issue with the plugin please report to in our discord!

**🪦 GravesSystem**

A lightweight, immersive, and highly performant death chest alternative for modern Minecraft servers.

GravesSystem replaces messy item drops and outdated death chests with a clean, immersive grave system designed for performance and compatibility.
When a player dies, their exact inventory layout is safely captured and a custom player head using their real Minecraft skin is placed at the death location.

Above the grave, a modern real-time hologram appears, displaying the victim’s name, the exact cause of death (PvP, fall, lava, etc.), and a live countdown timer until the grave expires — creating a clear, intuitive, and immersive death experience.

All logic is designed with performance in mind, ensuring minimal impact on the main server thread and zero world file clutter.

**✨ Key Features**

- Immersive Player Graves
  Graves are represented by the dead player’s actual head block, rendered using their real 
  Minecraft skin instead of clunky chests.

- Exact Inventory Preservation
  The plugin captures and restores the player’s inventory slot-for-slot, ensuring items return   
  to the exact positions they were in before death.

- Instant Restoration
  Right-clicking the grave instantly restores items directly into the player’s inventory with  
  no menus or delays.

- Secure Ownership
  Only the grave owner can interact with or loot their grave. Other players cannot break, 
  steal, or interfere.

- Modern Holograms
  Lightweight TextDisplay entities show the player name, death reason, and a live ticking  
  expiration timer above the grave.

- Automatic Cleanup
  Graves despawn cleanly when looted or when the configurable timer expires. If the player’s 
  inventory is full, remaining items are gently dropped on the ground.

- Highly Optimized
  Designed for modern servers with asynchronous handling where possible, ensuring excellent 
  performance even on busy servers.

- No Heavy Dependencies
  Does not rely on ProtocolLib or other heavy packet-manipulation plugins.

- World Blacklisting
  Easily disable the plugin in specific worlds via configuration.

**⚙️ Configuration**

GravesSystem is intentionally simple to configure:

- Set a global grave expiration time

- Blacklist specific worlds where graves should not appear

- No unnecessary options. No bloat.

**💡 Why GravesSystem?**

Built for server owners who value immersion, performance, and clean mechanics —
no ground clutter, no world file pollution, and no outdated chest-based systems.
